name: ai_sevak_portal_project
description: AI Sevak Portal monorepo (docs, presentation, web app, API).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n presentation,web,api -c magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:presentation" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace presentation-site && npm run build --workspace portal-web && npm run build --workspace api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace presentation-site && npm run lint --workspace portal-web && npm run lint --workspace api
